Masala Peanuts - Spiced Snacks with Tikka Herbs

March 4, 2026

Experience our delicious spiced peanuts roasted to perfection with a blend of aromatic Indian spices including authentic tikka herbs. These premium, hand-roasted peanuts are perfect for snacking, entertaining, or as a crunchy addition to salads and curries. Each batch is crafted with care using quality ingredients and traditional spice blending techniques.

Read more

Masala Cashew Nuts - Spiced Snacks with Tikka Herbs

March 4, 2026

Experience our delicious spiced cashew nuts roasted to perfection with a blend of aromatic Indian spices including authentic tikka herbs. These premium, hand-roasted cashews are perfect for snacking, entertaining, or as a crunchy addition to salads and curries. Each batch is crafted with care using quality ingredients and traditional spice blending techniques.

Read more

Classic Masala Loaf - Artisanal Spiced Bread with Tikka Herbs

March 4, 2026

Our signature masala loaf infused with authentic tikka herbs. Bold cumin, warm coriander, and fresh ginger create a complex, savory bread that pairs perfectly with curries or stands beautifully on its own. This artisanal loaf is hand-shaped and baked fresh every weekend using traditional techniques and clean ingredients.

Read more

✎ Edit sidebar

Weekend Loaf — Small-batch artisan masala bread, hand-crafted in Leander / Austin, Texas. Fresh every weekend. Order on WhatsApp: +1 (737) 424-8647
